preconditions: User is not authenticated and is operating in guest state.
Home page load completes successfully before interaction begins.

testCases.title: Verify guest user can directly access Home page using the approved entry URL
steps: Launch the application in a new browser session.
Wait for the Home page to fully load.
testCases.expectedResult: The application loads successfully at http://localhost/washtabui/home and displays the Home page in guest state without prompting for authentication.

testCases.title: Verify Person/Profile button navigates guest user to login page URL
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Observe the browser URL after navigation completes.
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates from the Home page to the login page and the URL equals /washtabui/login?data=undefined.

testCases.title: Verify Customer signup button navigates guest user to customer-search page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Click the Customer signup button once.
Observe the browser URL after navigation completes.
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates from the Home page to the customer-search workflow and the resulting URL contains /customer-search.

testCases.title: Verify Clean survey button navigates guest user to vehicle-survey page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Click the Clean survey button once.
Observe the browser URL after navigation completes.
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates from the Home page to the vehicle survey workflow and the resulting URL contains vehicle-survey.

testCases.title: Verify Site survey button navigates guest user to survey page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Click the Site survey button once.
Observe the browser URL after navigation completes.
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates from the Home page to the survey workflow and the resulting URL contains survey?data.

testCases.title: Verify all approved Home page navigation controls are enabled before interaction
steps: Wait for the Home page to finish loading.
Attempt to focus or hover over each approved navigation control.
testCases.expectedResult: All approved Home page navigation buttons are enabled, interactive, and available for user action before navigation begins.
